_note: Provenance for the vendored seqmake-part-view.js bundle. The automated copy step in the source repo MUST overwrite source/version/commit/built and recompute sha256 on every update; tests/test_widget_bundle.py fails if the committed .js does not match sha256. The bundle is not hand-reviewed (it is minified) — this sidecar is how each update stays auditable.
